description_long: This object consists of three distinct obelisks, each mounted on a square base platform. The obelisks are surrounded by four columns at each corner, supporting a square entablature with an open center, giving the appearance of a small pavilion or monument. The central obelisk is set on a brown, tiled platform with additional rectangular plinths and steps, while the two flanking obelisks are on plain, gray platforms. The structures are detailed with column capitals and bases, and the platforms are slightly raised above the ground. The color palette includes gray, brown, and purple hues, with each obelisk having a slightly different finish. The overall design is reminiscent of neoclassical or ancient monumental architecture, suitable for placement in a park, plaza, or urban square.
description: Three obelisks with columned pavilions on square platforms, featuring gray, brown, and purple tones and neoclassical architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three obelisks side by side, with the central brown-tiled platform and flanking gray platforms clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the platforms and the alignment of the columns and obelisks, with the open centers of the entablatures visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the obelisks and the symmetry of the column arrangements, with the brown platform in the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the platforms' depth and the arrangement of additional plinths on the central brown platform.
attribute_base_design: Each obelisk stands on a square platform, with the central one featuring a brown tiled surface and additional rectangular plinths and steps. The bases are slightly raised and bordered, with the flanking platforms being plain gray.
attribute_tip_design: The tips of the obelisks are flat and square, matching the entablature above, with no visible decorative elements or unique features.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisks are immediately surrounded by their own platforms and columns; the central obelisk's platform includes extra plinths and steps. No vegetation, fences, or statues are present.
